owner.name: Alvento AJ Chandler Jr
owner.professional_positioning: IT systems engineer and independent AI product builder

public_artifacts.name: Hermes sanitized orchestration evidence
public_artifacts.claim_boundary: Point-in-time first-party evidence; no continuous-health, certification, or full-restore claim.

projects.name: Wadevo Design
projects.ownership: independent end-to-end product design and implementation
projects.source_visibility: private; public sampler and walkthrough available
projects.problem: Let visitors experience AI-assisted design-system generation and portable agent context without exposing private workspaces, credentials, or unbounded model spending.
projects.architecture_decision: Public generated examples and guided exploration are separated from authenticated studio, settings, generation APIs, and spend-bearing model routes.

projects.name: Wadevo Finance
projects.status: live invite-only alpha with public landing
projects.source_visibility: private; invite or walkthrough required for the working product
projects.problem: Make urgent financial decisions legible without giving a model authority over calculations or financial truth.
projects.architecture_decision: A deterministic attention engine owns alerts and projections; bounded AI interprets natural-language questions.
projects.current_data_posture: Manual entry and statement upload are available. Bank sync is not enabled in the current build.

projects.name: Agentic Systems Showcase
projects.claim_boundary: Demonstrates the pattern; not extracted private-product code.

projects.name: Healthspan
projects.source_visibility: private; walkthrough available to hiring teams
projects.architecture_decision: Every derived result carries inputs, coverage, baseline, confidence, algorithm version, limitations, and reassessment period.
projects.claim_boundary: General-wellness prototype, not a medical device or clinical system.

projects.name: Hermes agent lab
projects.status: active personal lab with a recent orchestration regression under repair
projects.source_visibility: private lab; sanitized workflow, probes, and walkthrough available
projects.architecture_decision: A manager routes work across isolated role profiles with separate models, tools, state, authority, and concurrency; durable board dependencies and bounded context packets connect the team to an Obsidian knowledge layer.
projects.sanitized_workflow: revision-specific review -> requested changes -> corrected revision -> new review -> approval -> dependency-bound non-live verification -> idempotent terminal reconcile
projects.claim_boundary: Point-in-time first-party inspection; no production certification, continuous-health guarantee, flawless-autonomy claim, or completed full disaster-recovery restore.

evaluation_policy: These are first-party portfolio claims. Public links and surfaces may be inspected directly; private implementation evidence is available in a hiring-team walkthrough.
